**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

The hallucinated Apple Inc. payload has been thoroughly purged. Nanjing Xin Qidian Intelligent Manufacturing Technology Co., Ltd. presents a classic case of 'Intelligent Manufacturing' taxonomy inflation masking an asset-light IT and integration service node. Despite being officially classified under 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' and proudly incorporating 'Intelligent Manufacturing' into its corporate name, the physical reality immediately shatters this heavy-industry facade. The entity operates with a 4-person workforce out of 'Room 1720-16, 17th Floor, Yunmi City', possessing a paid-in capital of just 272,000 RMB. It is physically and financially impossible to manufacture 'Intelligent Basic Manufacturing Equipment', 'Industrial Robots', or 'Electric Motors' within a 17th-floor micro-office or virtual desk ('1720-16') . By analyzing the remainder of its business scope—which includes 'Production Line Management Services', 'Software Development', 'Industrial Robot Installation', and 'System Integration'—the true operational model surfaces. This is a 4-person micro-agency acting as a Systems Integrator and Software Provider for manufacturing clients . They write the code (IoT, Big Data, automation software) and install/maintain robots purchased from actual OEMs, completely devoid of their own hardware manufacturing capacity.
